_disclaimer: SYNTHETIC DEMONSTRATION DATA ONLY. No real patients, staff, studies, PHI, or tenant data. All identifiers (AGT-NB-*, SRC-NB-*, STUDY-NB-*) are fabricated. Created solely for the Microsoft Agents League hackathon demo.

agents.name: PatientIntake Assistant
agents.purpose: Helps front-desk staff summarize incoming patient demographics and history.
agents._expected_primary_gap: Broad PHI access violates HIPAA minimum-necessary (164.502(b)) and access control (164.312(a)).

agents.name: ClinicalTrialCoordinator Agent
agents.purpose: Assists CRCs with protocol lookups and updates to study task records.
agents._expected_primary_gap: No secure, time-stamped audit trail of record changes violates 21 CFR 11.10(e) and HIPAA 164.312(b).

agents.name: ResearchData Explorer
agents.purpose: Lets researchers query datasets described as de-identified for cohort analysis.

data_sources.name: Research Cohort Dataset (claims to be de-identified)

agents._expected_primary_gap: Re-identifiable source treated as de-identified without a de-identification control: HIPAA + GDPR Art. 9 special-category risk.

agents.name: LabResults Helper
agents.purpose: Summarizes lab result documents for clinicians.
agents._expected_primary_gap: Unclassified PHI source means data-handling controls cannot be enforced or proven (classification coverage gap).

agents.name: Pharmacovigilance Assistant
agents.purpose: Helps safety staff triage adverse-event reports.
agents._expected_primary_gap: Records that may carry signatures lack an e-signature control (21 CFR 11.50/11.100) — partial posture, review recommended.

agents.name: HRBenefits Helper
agents._expected_primary_gap: No regulated data in scope; broad access acceptable for non-PHI FAQ content.
